content.question: What is the causal effect on mean achievement and inequality of *tracking age alone* in Hungary, net of free school choice, teacher allocation, and curriculum differences that bundle with tracking-age changes?
content.reduction_path: Conduct within-Hungary quasi-experimental design (e.g., regression discontinuity around the Grade 5 entry threshold for 6-year tracks, or exploit natural variation in school catchment policies across Hungarian municipalities) to isolate tracking-age effects from choice-regime effects. Or conduct randomized controlled trials with counterfactual assignment to early versus delayed tracking cohorts.
